news.headline: AiDash debuts Full Stack Platform for power grid inspection & monitoring, aiding utilities with climate threats.
news.summary: AiDash, a company based in Palo Alto, California, and New Orleans, has introduced a comprehensive system aimed at assisting critical infrastructure sectors in adapting to climate change and transitioning to sustainable energy practices. This enterprise SaaS company leverages satellite technology and artificial intelligence to help industries enhance their climate resilience. The newly launched Full Stack Platform for Grid Inspection and Monitoring is designed to tackle the pressing issues faced by utilities in the aftermath of climate-related disasters such as storms and wildfires. This system offers utilities the necessary data and analysis to proactively address challenges, enabling them to prevent potential disruptions.

news.headline: GridStor starts building 220 MW, 440 MWh battery storage project in Galveston County, Texas.
news.summary: Construction has officially begun on GridStor's Hidden Lakes Reliability battery facility in Galveston County, Texas. The project will boast an impressive capacity of 220 megawatts and storage capability of 440 megawatt-hours.

news.headline: Evergy to discuss Q3 earnings on Nov 7, 2024 at 9am Eastern Time. Event will include conference call and webcast.
news.summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) has announced that it will be releasing its third-quarter earnings for 2024 on Thursday, November 7, 2024, before the market opens. The company is scheduled to hold its quarterly conference call and audio webcast on the same day to discuss the results. The event, Evergy Q3 2024 Conference Call and Webcast, is set to take place on November 7, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern (8:00 a.m. Central time). The location for the event will include viewing the webcast and presentation slides.

news.headline: PowerSync partners with MongoDB to offer bi-directional sync engine as alternative for Atlas Device Sync users.
news.summary: PowerSync, now a partner of MongoDB, offers a bi-directional sync engine compatible with MongoDB as an alternative for users of Atlas Device Sync.

news.headline: Peak season for deer-car collisions (Oct-Dec) due to mating season. Grange Insurance offers tips for drivers.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, fall brings not just cooler weather and football but also a higher risk of deer-car collisions. As deer become more active during their peak season, Grange Insurance is providing five tips to help drivers avoid accidents. With deer populations on the rise and urban areas encroaching on rural habitats, the number of deer-vehicle collisions has been increasing. Grange Insurance advises drivers to be especially cautious between October and December, which marks the peak of deer migration and mating season. It is crucial for drivers to exercise extra vigilance during this time to prevent accidents.

news.headline: Verdantas acquires ASEC Engineers to boost sustainable energy solutions; ASEC specializes in power delivery, renewables.
news.summary: Verdantas, a prominent consulting firm specializing in sustainable solutions for environment, water, and energy markets, supported by Sterling Investment Partners, has successfully acquired ASEC Engineers (ASEC), a company centered in Denver, Colorado. ASEC is distinguished for its specialization in power delivery and renewable energy sectors, particularly excelling in electrical transmission, substation, and structural engineering. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for Verdantas, enhancing their expertise in these sectors.

news.headline: ICM successfully commissions FOT Oil Recovery™ System at Elite Octane, Iowa, producing 150M gallons ethanol/year.
news.summary: A new system called FOT Oil Recovery™ has been successfully started up and commissioned at Elite Octane, LLC’s ethanol facility in Atlantic, Iowa, by ICM, Inc. The facility, which began operations in 2018, produces more than 150 million gallons of ethanol annually. The installation of the FOT Oil Recovery™ system has surpassed expectations in terms of oil recovery and performance targets. Notably, Elite Octane was the pioneer facility to adopt this technology as a standalone system.

news.headline: Karrier One, Ice Wireless, and TCOR Solutions come together to create "KIT Consortium" for Indigenous-led spectrum projects in Canada.
news.summary: In Toronto, three companies, Karrier One, Ice Wireless, and TCOR Solutions, have joined forces to create the "KIT Consortium," aimed at swiftly implementing Indigenous-led spectrum projects in Canada. This collaboration brings together a wealth of expertise and resources to facilitate the rapid deployment of these initiatives. By combining their strengths, the consortium intends to drive innovation and ensure the efficient execution of projects in this sector. This strategic partnership underscores a commitment to advancing Indigenous participation in the telecommunications industry.

news.headline: OPEX Corporation wins NJMEP Innovator of the Year Award & Merit Award for Technology in Robotics.
news.summary: A company based in Moorestown, New Jersey, OPEX® Corporation, a prominent figure in Next Generation Automation for document, mail, and warehouse automation, has been honored with two notable awards. The company was recognized as the Innovator of the Year by the New Jersey Manufacturing Extension Program (NJMEP) and also received the Silver Merit Award for Technology in Robotics for their latest warehouse automation solution. These honors were bestowed upon OPEX for their outstanding contributions to the industry.

news.headline: 2024 Global Metaverse Conference in Seoul will focus on ethical innovation, global ethics with over 1,000 attendees.
news.summary: The upcoming 2024 Global Metaverse Conference in Seoul, South Korea will focus on exploring strategies for ethical and responsible growth within the metaverse. This event is expected to attract a large number of participants and experts in the field of artificial intelligence and digital technologies. Discussions at the conference will center around key issues such as privacy, security, and inclusivity in the rapidly evolving digital landscape. This initiative highlights the importance of addressing ethical considerations and promoting responsible practices in the development of the metaverse.

news.headline: Happy Aging enters $600B longevity market with 2 products: SYMPHONYAge, OMICmAge tests for biological age, sweeping wellness industry.
news.summary: Happy Aging, a new wellness brand, has partnered with TruDiagnostic for its launch, becoming the first brand to provide consumers with the SYMPHONYAge and OMICmAge biological age tests. The launch took place in Miami on October 17, 2024. Happy Aging's products are aimed at promoting healthy aging.

news.headline: DriveWealth integrates with multiple EMS platforms for institutional broker-dealers, improving efficiency and connectivity.
news.summary: DriveWealth, a prominent financial technology platform offering Brokerage-as-a-Service based in New York, recently disclosed its complete integration with several execution management system (EMS) platforms, such as Bloomberg EMSX, LSEG Autex, and TRAFiX. This integration allows institutional broker-dealers to link up with DriveWealth's platform, leading to advantages like simplified trade bookings, decreased integration duration, and smooth entry to advanced functionalities. The main objective behind this initiative is to facilitate a seamless and efficient trading experience for professionals in the finance industry.

news.headline: SmartRent reached landmark: one millionth self-guided tour at Metro on First, a luxury community in Scottsdale, Arizona.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, SmartRent recently celebrated reaching a significant milestone with their one-millionth Self-Guided Tour at the upscale Metro on First property managed by Equity Residential. SmartRent's innovative approach to self-guided tours in the multifamily sector has proven successful, with this particular milestone being a testament to its growing popularity. This accomplishment highlights the increasing adoption of technology-driven solutions in the real estate industry.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: The disinflationary process is well on track.
UMCG and SHINE Europe get €10.5M to boost European terbium isotope production for cancer theranostics.
news.summary: A partnership between the University Medical Center Groningen (UMCG) and SHINE Europe has been established in Groningen and Veendam, Netherlands on October 17, 2024. The collaboration is geared towards advancing cancer research and ensuring the medical supply chain of essential isotopes in Europe. This venture will play a key role in the research and distribution of vital medical materials, emphasizing the significance of the cooperation between UMCG and SHINE in addressing cancer-related challenges and enhancing healthcare infrastructure.

news.headline: eCLUTCH to host exclusive beachside cocktail event at MIPCOM 2024 in Switzerland. Invitation-only party on second evening.
news.summary: In Pfaffikon, Switzerland on October 17, 2024, eCLUTCH, a groundbreaking esports broadcasting platform, is excited to unveil an exclusive beachside cocktail party during the second night of MIPCOM 2024. This highly anticipated event is invitation-only and will occur on a specific date in October.

news.headline: Better.com introduces Betsy™, voice-based AI Loan Assistant for US mortgage industry, enhancing operational efficiency.
news.summary: In New York, Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR) unveiled Betsy™, the pioneering voice-based AI Loan Assistant for the US mortgage sector. This launch marks a breakthrough in the industry, developed through Better.com's exclusive loan origination platform, Tinman™. With Betsy's introduction, operational efficiency for Better.com's licensed Loan Officers, Processors, and Closers is significantly enhanced. Furthermore, this innovation aims to elevate customer experience, offering a more streamlined and efficient mortgage process.

news.headline: SMA Technologies appoints John Roper as Chief Revenue Officer to oversee sales, customer success, and partner teams.
news.summary: In Houston, SMA Technologies, a top provider of automation solutions for financial services and creator of OpCon workload automation and orchestration (WLA&O), has named John Roper as the new Chief Revenue Officer. Roper, with 20+ years of experience in guiding companies through growth phases, will be in charge of the Sales, Customer Success, and Partner teams. He will determine the strategic path for SMA's go-to-market endeavors.

news.headline: Inter-Organization Cancer Genetics group backs NCCN guidelines for expanded genetic testing in colorectal, endometrial, and gastric cancers.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 17, 2024, a group known as INTERACT praised the National Comprehensive Cancer Network (NCCN) for its recent revisions to the Genetic/Familial High-Risk Assessment for Colorectal, Endometrial, and Gastric cancers. This endorsement comes from the Inter-Organization Cancer Genetics Clinical Evidence Coalition and highlights the importance of these updates in enhancing cancer prevention and treatment strategies. The specific details regarding the changes made by NCCN were not provided in this news snippet.

news.headline: Netherlands collaborates with U.S. for smart grids, aiming for innovation in Boston & Houston, Oct 21-25, 2024.
news.summary: Dutch and American experts are joining forces to exchange smart grids knowledge and explore investment prospects during an innovation mission in Boston and Houston from October 21-25, 2024. The Netherlands is focusing on enhancing energy grids by making them more intelligent and environmentally friendly.

news.headline: IPSY partners with Lisa Vanderpump for Icon Box, offering ultimate pampering experience. Los Angeles, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: A well-known figure from reality TV, Lisa Vanderpump, has collaborated with IPSY to offer a luxurious pampering experience in the Icon Box. This partnership was revealed in Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, by IPSY, a prominent beauty membership service. Lisa Vanderpump, a reality TV personality, restaurant owner, and philanthropist, has curated this special box.

news.headline: SoundHound AI's voice assistant now in Lancia Ypsilon vehicles across Europe. Integration in 7 countries, including Belgium, France, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Spain, and The Netherlands.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN) unveiled that its voice artificial intelligence system, SoundHound Chat AI, has been incorporated into Lancia Ypsilon cars in Belgium, France, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Spain, and The Netherlands. Lancia's advanced S.A.L.A. (Sound, Air, Light, and Augmentation) infotainment setup now includes SoundHound Chat AI, offering users an enhanced voice assistant experience. This integration marks a significant milestone as it expands the reach of the innovative technology to a wide audience in various European countries.

news.headline: MDA Space to hold Q3 earnings conference call on Nov 15, 2024. Financial results to be released before market open. TSX:MDA.
news.summary: A company based in Brampton, Ontario, MDA Space Ltd. (TSX:MDA), a leading collaborator in the global space sector, revealed its plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Friday, November 15, 2024, before the market opens. The exact time was not specified in the initial notice.

news.headline: Energy Recovery wins $12M contracts in UAE for 3 desalination projects with capacity of close to 1 million cubic meters/day. Delivery by Q4 2024.
news.summary: In San Leandro, California, Energy Recovery revealed that they have secured contract awards exceeding $12 million for their PX® Pressure Exchanger® (PX) energy recovery devices. These contracts are for three seawater reverse osmosis (SWRO) desalination projects in the United Arab Emirates, with a combined capacity of nearly 1 million cubic meters per day. The company anticipates shipping the orders by the fourth quarter of 2024. These contract wins were previously disclosed in the company’s financial forecasts.

news.headline: Aerwave closes funding program to deploy $50 million for Managed WiFi service, targeting multifamily industry.
news.summary: A managed WiFi service adoption support program has been introduced by Aerwave in Houston on October 17, 2024. This program, known as AerPays, aims to boost connectivity in multifamily properties. Aerwave, a next-generation managed WiFi platform, is behind this initiative.

news.headline: New Jersey Appellate Division rules in favor of Tamar Herman. The Lawfare Project continues to support her.
news.summary: Prominent Jewish civil rights organization extends support to a popular teacher in New Jersey. The New Jersey Appellate Division recently acknowledged the efforts of The Lawfare Project, along with their legal counsel, in the case. The organization continues to assist in ensuring justice for the teacher. This development took place on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Bonitasoft appoints Christophe Bouron as new CEO, focused on international expansion and AI innovation. Bouron succeeds Charles Souillard.
news.summary: In Grenoble, France, Bonitasoft, a leading Business Process Management company, has appointed Christophe Bouron as its new CEO. This move signifies a strategic shift for the firm to bolster global growth and advance technological innovation, especially in AI. Bouron takes over from Charles Souillard, the former CEO and co-founder of Bonitasoft in 2009. The change in leadership is part of the company's plan to expand internationally and focus on AI development.

news.headline: Terray Therapeutics raises $120M in Series B funding to develop AI-generated small molecule therapeutics.
news.summary: Terray Therapeutics has revealed that they are moving forward with their Generative AI Pipeline of Small Molecule Therapeutics with a Series B funding of $120 million. This significant investment aims to advance the development of innovative therapeutic solutions.

news.headline: SG Devco released a letter to shareholders, including CEO David Villarreal, on Oct. 17, 2024, via PRNewswire.
news.summary: Miami, FL - In a recent announcement by Safe and Green Development Corporation (NASDAQ: SGD), a prominent real estate development firm, the CEO, David Villarreal, shared a letter addressed to shareholders. The letter discussed various updates and initiatives undertaken by the company. Safe and Green Development Corporation, a company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SGD, emphasized their commitment to sustainable and safe development practices. This communication underscores the company's dedication to transparency and engagement with its investors.

news.headline: PatchRx and Optimize Health team up to provide remote care solutions enhancing patient care outcomes and reducing costs.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, as of October 17, 2024, PatchRx, a company specializing in remote care solutions, has introduced a new innovative approach. By combining various remote care technologies, they are able to provide essential information regarding a patient's medical background, their response to prescribed treatments, and their adherence to medication schedules. This holistic approach aims at enhancing the quality of care, leading to better health outcomes and lowering overall healthcare expenses.

news.headline: Pinnacle Fertility partners with Berry Fertility, adopts fertility management app, focuses on tech-driven patient care.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Pinnacle Fertility, an advanced nationwide network of fertility clinics led by physicians and focused on patient care, has revealed its partnership with Berry Fertility. This partnership signifies the first adoption of Berry's groundbreaking fertility management app within the network. It highlights Pinnacle's dedication to utilizing cutting-edge technology and providing top-tier service to patients in their fertility journey. This collaboration is part of Pinnacle's overall plan to improve the patient experience.

news.headline: MassMutual offers eligible policyholders free access to AI mental health app Wysa Assure in the US - a first for insurers.
news.summary: MassMutual, based in Springfield, Massachusetts, and Boston, is making headlines as the first insurer in the United States to provide eligible policyholders with complimentary access to Wysa Assure, a conversational mental health app driven by artificial intelligence. This move underscores their commitment to supporting mental well-being.

news.headline: Gluware introduces Co-Pilot for NetDevOps, integrates with NetBox and GitHub. ONUG Fall 2024, Sacramento. #automation #networking
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in intelligent network automation has revealed a range of new advancements in preparation for the upcoming ONUG Fall 2024 conference in Sacramento, California. Gluware, known for its expertise in intelligent network automation, disclosed a set of fresh services and features aimed at enhancing network management. The developments are expected to revolutionize the industry and offer significant benefits to users.

news.headline: Contentful names Elizabeth Maxson as CMO. Platform trusted by 4,200+ customers. Focus on composable solutions and AI.
news.summary: In Denver and Berlin, Contentful, a top composable content platform with 4,200+ customers, has named Elizabeth Maxson as Chief Marketing Officer. Contentful is at the forefront of transforming the industry from old monolithic content systems to adaptable, fully composable solutions. These offer AI-driven personalization and provide scalable content for major brands. This move comes as marketers seek ways to stand out and adapt to changing demands.

news.headline: Collaboration between SHINE Technologies, UW-Madison, and WARF Therapeutics creates new treatments for kidney & prostate cancers, achieving 100% survival in pre-clinical research with WT-7695 radiopharmaceutical using Ilumira.
news.summary: Recent pre-clinical studies have demonstrated that the radiopharmaceutical WT-7695 from WARF Therapeutics, utilizing SHINE's Ilumira, led to 100% survival in a kidney cancer model. Additionally, ART-101, an innovative prostate cancer therapy created at the Advanced Radiotheranostics Lab with the help of SHINE's Ilumira technology, has shown promising results.

news.headline: Myriad Systems introduces AI charting tools in White Plains, aiming to streamline clinical documentation effort.
news.summary: A company based in White Plains, New York, Myriad Systems, has unveiled innovative AI-powered upgrades aimed at streamlining compliant clinical documentation procedures. These enhancements are projected to significantly decrease the time and resources required for these tasks.

news.headline: Sherwin-Williams unveils first Color Capsule of the Year for 2025 in collaboration with East Olivia, marking the 15th anniversary.
news.summary: Sherwin-Williams introduces a new color capsule and exclusive Forever Floral bouquet in collaboration with East Olivia to commemorate the 15th anniversary of its Color of the Year. On October 17, 2024, in Cleveland, the company unveiled the special collection. This initiative marks a milestone for Sherwin-Williams as they celebrate 15 years of selecting a Color of the Year.

news.headline: Xerox buys ITsavvy for $400 million to expand IT services. Deal expected to close in Q4 2024.
news.summary: Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) has recently revealed its plan to purchase ITsavvy, a company based in Oak Brook, Illinois, specializing in integrated IT products and services, for $400 million. The acquisition will involve a $180 million cash payment along with secured promissory notes amounting to $220 million. The deal is subject to standard pre- and post-closing adjustments and escrow arrangements and is anticipated to be finalized in the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: HEN Nozzles gets $8M for faster fire suppression with 67% less water, aiming to innovate firefighting technology.
news.summary: A company based in Hayward, California called HEN Nozzles, known for their advancements in firefighting technology, has recently disclosed securing a substantial $8 million in seed funding. This financial boost is aimed at expediting the progress of their fluidics technology, which has demonstrated the capacity to put out fires at a rate 300% faster than conventional methods, all while consuming 67% less water. The urgency for such innovation stems from the increasing severity of wildfires and structure fires on a global scale, coupled with the lack of significant progress in firefighting technology over the years. The funds acquired will be channeled towards advancing the development and implementation of HEN Nozzles’ pioneering fire suppression solutions. They have expressed their enthusiasm in unveiling these new products to address the pressing need for more efficient firefighting techniques.

news.headline: Hilton debuts suite inspired by Wicked characters Elphaba and Glinda for movie release. New York Hilton Midtown offers immersive stay experience. Global cinematic event Wicked arrives in theaters November 22, 2024.
news.summary: Travelers and fans can indulge in an immersive stay at New York Hilton Midtown to celebrate the upcoming global cinematic event, Universal Pictures' Wicked, hitting theaters on November 22, 2024. Located in MCLEAN, Va., this unique experience is brought by Hilton and Universal Pictures for the holiday season. This exclusive event promises a one-of-a-kind celebration with various exciting activities.

news.headline: Bluesight acquires Sectyr to enhance Medication Intelligence solutions for health systems. Acquisition expands capabilities.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on October 17, 2024, Bluesight, a prominent company offering Medication Intelligence™ solutions for health systems and hospital pharmacies, revealed its acquisition of Sectyr, a premier compliance and audit management platform. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for Bluesight in their efforts to enhance their services.

news.headline: QCY introduces H3 Pro headphones with 50dB noise cancellation & LDAC audio coding for hi-fi sound.
news.summary: The H3 Pro, a new addition to QCY's noise-canceling over-ear headphone range, is being launched in Dongguan, China on October 17, 2024. This model features dual-chip technology and LDAC audio coding for high-quality sound reproduction. QCY, a prominent brand in the field of audio solutions, is introducing the H3 Pro to cater to the growing demand for advanced audio products.

news.headline: Company adopts ergonomic tech for safer work environment, emphasizing staff wellbeing.
CyCognito improves its CyCognito AST product with support for AWS Organizations, enhancing efficiency for pentester and red teams.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California on October 17, 2024, CyCognito unveiled updates to its CyCognito Automated Security Testing (AST) product. The latest improvements streamline cloud testing processes through enhanced support for AWS Organizations. These updates introduce new workflows aimed at optimizing the efficiency of Pentester and Red Teams. CyCognito's AST product aims to bolster security measures and improve testing practices in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: Starbox launches AI-Driven Digital Human System on WeChat for 800+ merchants and 2M users, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on October 17, 2024, Starbox Group Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: STBX), a provider of cash rebates, advertising, and payment solutions, shared that its subsidiary, Starbox Technologies Sdn. Bhd., has introduced an AI-Driven Digital Human System for merchants on WeChat Channels. This system serves more than 800 Starbox Technologies' merchants and over two million current users through live streaming and short videos.

news.headline: Getac and SOTI partner to enhance mobile solutions in NA, boosting productivity and cutting costs. Citation: PRNewswire, Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: Getac Technology Corporation ("Getac"), a leading provider of rugged computing devices, based in IRVINE, Calif., disclosed on Oct. 17, 2024, its partnership that aims to enhance mobile device performance and security in various sectors. The collaboration spans from manufacturing to military deployments, ensuring the efficiency and security of mobile devices. The initiative is set to bolster productivity and cut costs for industries leveraging mobile technology.

news.headline: Hain Celestial to release Q1 2025 results on Nov 7, 2024. Conference call hosted at 8:00 AM ET. Wendy Davidson, CEO, to speak.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, on October 17, 2024, Hain Celestial Group (Nasdaq: HAIN), a prominent global health and wellness company promoting healthier living through better-for-you brands, is set to release its financial outcomes for the fiscal first quarter on Thursday, November 7, 2024, prior to the market opening. A conference call, including a webcast to discuss the results, is scheduled for 8:00 AM ET. Wendy Davidson, President and CEO, and Lee Boyce, CFO, will represent Hain Celestial during the event. The discussion will be followed by a question-and-answer session involving analysts.

news.headline: Tipmefast, Inc. subsidiary Lucent Inc. secures $1 million purchase order from Green Reliable Energy Auto Technology Co. Ltd.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, on October 17, 2024, Tipmefast, Inc. (OTC: TMEF) reported that its subsidiary, Lucent, Inc., secured a purchase order worth $1,087,074.66. The order came from Green Reliable Energy Auto Technology Co. Ltd., a company specializing in sustainable energy solutions for commercial and residential purposes.

news.headline: Wipro's Q2 earnings: IT Services revenue down 2%, stock bonus proposed. Revenue of $2.66 billion, 1% y/y decline. EPS in line with estimates.
news.summary: Wipro Ltd (NYSE:WIT) saw a decline in its stock following the release of its second-quarter results. The company reported gross revenue of 223.0 billion rupees ($2.66 billion), marking a 1.0% decrease compared to the previous year and falling below the analyst consensus estimate of $2.67 billion. The earnings per share (EPS) of 7 cents met the analyst consensus estimate. The IT Services revenue also experienced a 2.0% year-on-year decline to $2.66 billion, with the adjusted constant currency IT Services segment revenue showing a 2.3% decrease year-on-year. Further details on the IT Services' operating margin can be found on Benzinga.com. Additionally, Lenovo's AI advancements have expanded through collaborations with Meta and Nvidia outside of China.

news.headline: Truxton Corp reported Q3 2024 net income of $4.57M, $5.5M non-interest income. Loans were up 2.5% at $665M, deposits increased by 6% to $889M.
news.summary: Truxton Corporation reported third-quarter net income of $4.57 million in 2024, compared to $4.56 million in the same quarter in 2023, attributing the growth to increased net interest income and wealth management revenue. Non-interest income was $5.5 million, with wealth management contributing 95%. Moreover, loans increased by 2.5% to $665 million, and total deposits rose by 6% to $889 million. The bank's net interest margin was 2.69% in the third quarter, with a Tier 1 leverage ratio of 10.46%. The company paid dividends of $2.29 per common share and repurchased 59,717 shares of common stock for $3.99 million. Truxton Trust Company continues to excel in providing wealth, banking, and family office services.
